Container.Name: Sharkord
Container.Overview:
Sharkord is a self-hosted real-time communication platform (Discord-like) with text and WebRTC (voice/video/screen sharing).
NOTE: The container no longer runs as root (it runs as the non-root user "bun", uid 1000). Ensure your appdata path is writable by uid 1000 to avoid EACCES errors (e.g. chown -R 1000:1000 /mnt/user/appdata/sharkord).
FIRST RUN: After starting the container, see the GitHub README for “Gain Owner Permissions” to claim ownership.
HTTPS: Sharkord does not include built-in HTTPS. Use a reverse proxy (e.g. Nginx or Caddy) for SSL/TLS.
Alpha software — expect breaking changes.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent Sharkord config/data (config.ini is created on first run). Container runs as uid 1000 (bun) — ensure this path is writable.

Config.Name: WebRTC UDP Port
Config.Description: WebRTC UDP media port. Required for voice/video/screen sharing.
